case_title: ESTATE OF ALVIN PESKIN VS. JOHNNY J CARTER et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-21-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTATE OF ALVIN PESKIN AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, JOHNNY J DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-07-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-10-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-26-2007
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-06-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-06-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST NOUR CHAMMAS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-06-2007 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-21-2007. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MAUREEN HOWARD, CSR# 7156. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-07-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ESTATE OF ALVIN PESKIN
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-22-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2008 CONTINUED TO APR-21-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-21-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST NOUR CHAMMAS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-21-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RITA ARLENE HOWELL, CSR#2542. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-21-2008 CONTINUED TO JUL-21-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
